description: Smart accounts, x402 payments, on-chain reputation, and service discovery for AI agents
name: io.github.azeth-protocol/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Owner private key (0x-prefixed, 64 hex chars). Auto-generated and saved to ~/.azeth/key if not set.
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Target chain: base, baseSepolia, ethereum, ethereumSepolia (default: baseSepolia)
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_CHAIN

environmentVariables.description: Guardian co-signing private key for operations exceeding spending limits (optional)
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_GUARDIAN_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable automatic guardian co-signing (requires AZETH_GUARDIAN_KEY)
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_GUARDIAN_AUTO_SIGN

environmentVariables.description: Custom RPC for Base Sepolia (optional, defaults to public RPC). Per-chain: AZETH_RPC_URL_BASE, AZETH_RPC_URL_ETH_SEPOLIA, AZETH_RPC_URL_ETHEREUM
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_RPC_URL_BASE_SEPOLIA

environmentVariables.description: Azeth server URL for off-chain operations like reputation queries (optional)
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Emergency withdrawal destination address (defaults to owner EOA if not set)
environmentVariables.name: AZETH_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: XMTP database encryption key for persistent messaging (optional, enables agent-to-agent messaging)
environmentVariables.name: XMTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY
